action.reasoning: Observation: best 0.594 (iter16: replay500/KD0.5-T2/consol5, early tasks~0.48 late~0.7-0.8, val~0.596). Iters17-22 all failed (0.58->0.35->0.09->0.50->0.21->0.17) due to persistent train.py truncation (ends mid-DataLoader or earlier; missing full loop/KD/opt/mem_update_after_task/consol; late tasks random acc~0.05 loss~3.2, val~0.07 until partial consol recovery). Curves/logs confirm no post-task0 learning. Analysis: long train.py causes workspace truncation; prior successful runs had complete balanced mem (meta+torch.where/randperm AFTER train), full KD (KLDiv on log_softmax/T**2), per-epoch val+best tracking, per-task Cosine reset, final best ckpt. Replay+KD+consol+best-val proven at 0.594. Decision: fully rewrite COMPLETE concise non-truncated train.py matching iter16 params (mem=500/task balanced per-class, epochs/task=6, consol=5@lower_lr, Adam(5e-4,wd=1e-5), KD beta=0.5 T=2.0, Cosine per-task, dense log every20steps+val/best/epoch, deepcopy old_model, mem update AFTER task, final best ckpt). Keep model.py/predict.py. Run train then submit_eval to recover >0.59 (target >0.61).
